content.en:
The Perfect Body was very powerful, and once it was cultivated, Ye Tian felt that his strength was probably comparable to that of a Ten-Realm level controller who had broken through the ninth layer of the Taichu Tower.

At that time, he might be second only to Senior Brother Black Decay in strength.

And Ye Tian also divided the perfect body into four realms: entry, small success, great completion, and consummation, but just getting started required mastering hundreds of millions of changes in many Daos.

And the cultivation of the perfect body is to stage hundreds of millions of changes in the body of a kind of path, like the reorganization and transformation of the physical body.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body showed a kind of change in the way of the body, which was integrated into the physical body, and turned into many changes in the way of the physical body, and these changes combined to slowly reorganize Ye Tian's body.

Of course, this process is a very long process, even with Ye Tian's innate ability, it will at least take hundreds of millions of years to truly complete the transformation.

But once the transformation is completed and the perfect body is cultivated, then Ye Tian's strength will also skyrocket.

With hundreds of millions of years of penance, you can exchange for incomparably strong strength, which is naturally very cost-effective.

And Ye Tian's other copy body did not waste time, he was also taking the road of breaking the shackles and chains, using the primordial black qi with a large number of life white stones to constantly break the shackles and chains.

Anyway, if one body breaks through, the other body will also break through, so it doesn't affect anything.

Time flies, Ye Tian's strength is constantly improving, and the Origin Realm Sea is very calm, and nothing major has happened.

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian broke the two shackles and chains again, breaking a total of twenty-two shackles and chains, but in the back, the shackles and chains became more and more difficult to break.

And this day.

Ye Tian's perfect body is about to be condensed successfully.

Rumble!!!!!

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's perfect body, and the movement was too great to be concealed at all.

......

"It's River Ninetieth, what's going on?"

"It seems that there is an eternal master who has broken through, right?"

"But this movement is too big, even the Nine Realm-level Controllers have broken through to the Ten-Realm Masters, and the movement is not so big!"

"Could it be that someone has surpassed the Ten Realms-level masters?"

"No, this movement hasn't reached that level yet!"

"The person who made this movement is the Endless Master, go over and take a look!"

One by one, the Eternal Masters shuttled to the Ninetieth Boundary River, including several of Ye Tian's senior brothers and sisters.

"This ...... The aura of the little junior brother is too terrifying, it has completely surpassed me by much, many times!"

The Snow Maiden Controller was surprised.

The Black Decay Controller was also very surprised, "I'm afraid that the strength of the little junior brother is not much weaker than mine, and the little junior brother has a special physique, with the physique of the Devouring Mountain, he can absorb damage, I really don't have to be his opponent anymore!"

"The talent of the little junior brother is really terrifying, and it has been so huge in just such a short time, it can't be compared!" the Ancient Demon Controller also exclaimed.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's transformation was finally completed.

Bang!!!!

The perfect body was completely cultivated, and many time and space seemed to be unable to withstand Ye Tian's perfect body, and they were collapsing one by one.

But soon, Ye Tian gradually took control of his perfect body, and many time and space stabilized one by one.

Soon after, Ye Tian walked out of his retreat.

And the Black Decay Controllers and Ancient Demon Controllers appeared one by one.

"Little junior brother, you are so surprising, in such a short time, you have actually completed a breakthrough again. The Black Rotten Ruler said.

"It's a fluke!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He was also very happy with the breakthrough in strength, but he did not swell either.

Seeing the mysterious powerhouse at the White Bone Abyss, he knew that his strength was still very poor.

He didn't know if that person had reached another realm, or if he was still at the level of a half-step transcendence of the Ten Realm-level masters, but the strength of the other party was definitely many times stronger than him.

Therefore, he still needs to work hard.

"Little junior brother, are you interested in having a discussion?"

The Black Rotten Master said.

He hadn't fought for too long, and the other Ten Realm-level controllers of the Origin Realm Sea were unwilling to fight with him one by one, and they almost couldn't beat him.

The Black Emperor Ancestor was an opponent before, but he was very mysterious at all, and he almost never appeared.

And Heizu is very active, but unfortunately it was sealed.

As a result, he had few opponents.

Now, Ye Tian has broken through, and he wants to fight well.

"Since Senior Brother Black Decay wants to learn, I'll accompany you!" Ye Tian said.

The Black Decay Controller was overjoyed, "It's still a little junior brother who is refreshing, unlike your ancient demon senior brother, who is not happy at all." "

The ancient demon controller said embarrassedly: "Senior Brother Black Decay, I'm not your opponent, isn't it looking for abuse to fight with you?"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Black Decay Controller entered the end of the realm, where they could fight with confidence and would not affect the Origin Realm Sea.

......

The End of the World.

Ye Tian and the Black Decay Masters were about to fight, and this place was a little far away from the Origin Realm Sea, so fighting here would not attract the attention of other Eternal Masters.

After all, they are only fighting internally, and they don't want to be exposed.

Soon, the two fought.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and the Black Decay Controller continued to fight, the speed of the two of them was extremely fast, every move and style was comparable to the top Origin Control Technique, almost turning a top Origin Control Technique into instinct, and it broke out casually.

Abrupt.

The Black Decay Controller presented a statue of a dragon with ten thousand phases, and his strength increased sharply.

And at this time, a statue of Wanxianglin Dragon also appeared on Ye Tian's body.

"Little junior brother, you have been practicing for such a short time, and you have even gathered a statue of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon!"

The Black Rotten Ruler was a little surprised.

In the entire Origin Realm Sea, there are only two Ten Realm-level controllers who have truly gathered the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon Statue.

One is him, the other is Heizu, and now Ye Tian has to be added.

"Junior Brother, I don't know what kind of secret technique you have obtained from this Wanxiang Lin Dragon Statue is the secret technique of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon Clan?" said the Black Decay Controller curiously.

"It's a void eye!"

Ye Tian immediately cast this secret technique.

Airplanes!!!

Billions of planes and planes were frozen, and the bodies of the Black Decay Masters seemed to be frozen.

Then, Ye Tian cast the space-time splitting blade and slashed it with a single sword.

At this time, the Black Decay Controller turned into ten thousand phases and broke away from the void eye, and this knife only shattered hundreds of phases.

In the next moment, the Black Decay Controller was back to its original state.

"My secret technique is the incarnation of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon Clan, once this secret technique is cast, you can break all kinds of shackles, incarnate all phases, and counteract many attacks, which is an excellent secret technique to escape and save your life. The Black Rotten Ruler said.

The two fought for a long time, and it seemed that they were evenly matched.

At this time, the Black Decay Controller said solemnly: "Little junior brother, next I will perform my strongest move, which may hurt you, this is also my famous trick, surpassing the top origin control technique, reaching the level of surpassing the top origin control technique in half a step, and it belongs to the level of the master that can only be created!"

"Senior Brother Black Decay, just make a move, I also have hole cards!"

Ye Tian said.

Hearing this, the Black Decay Controller was no longer worried, and directly performed his technique.
